info.name: Practo CMS V2 — Complete (Part 1 + Part 2)
info.description:
Complete API collection for Practo Hub CMS V2.

## Part 1 — Script Workflow (Phases 1–3)
Covering script creation → Content/Brand review → Agency production → Medical review → Content/Brand approval → Content Approver lock.

## Part 2 — Video Workflow (Phases 4–5)
Covering First Line Up (rough cut) and First Cut (final cut) video upload, Medical Affairs review, Content/Brand review, approve/reject cycle.

---

## Base URL
- Direct IP (permanent): http://164.52.204.34:5001
- Cloudflare HTTPS (session): check /tmp/v2-backend-url.txt on server

⚠️ Cloudflare URL changes on server restart. Direct IP never changes.

## How to use
1. Run the Login request for the role you want to test
2. Token is auto-saved to {{token}} — no manual copy needed
3. All other requests use {{token}} automatically

## Test Accounts (all use password: Admin@123)
- Super Admin      → admin@practo.com
- Medical Affairs  → medical@practo.com
- Content/Brand    → brand@practo.com
- Agency POC       → agency@practo.com
- Content Approver → approver@practo.com

## Part 1 Workflow Order
Step 0  [Medical Affairs]   POST /api/scripts                         → Create Script
Step 1  [Medical Affairs]   POST /api/scripts/:id/submit             → DRAFT → CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW
Step 2a [Content/Brand]     POST /api/scripts/:id/reject             → CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW → DRAFT
Step 2b [Content/Brand]     POST /api/scripts/:id/approve            → CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW → AGENCY_PRODUCTION
Step 3  [Agency POC]        POST /api/scripts/:id/submit-revision    → AGENCY_PRODUCTION → MEDICAL_REVIEW
Step 4a [Medical Affairs]   POST /api/scripts/:id/reject             → MEDICAL_REVIEW → AGENCY_PRODUCTION
Step 4b [Medical Affairs]   POST /api/scripts/:id/approve            → MEDICAL_REVIEW → CONTENT_BRAND_APPROVAL
Step 5  [Content/Brand]     POST /api/scripts/:id/approve            → CONTENT_BRAND_APPROVAL → CONTENT_APPROVER_REVIEW
Step 6  [Content Approver]  POST /api/scripts/:id/lock               → CONTENT_APPROVER_REVIEW → LOCKED ✅
Emergency [Super Admin]:    POST /api/scripts/:id/unlock             → LOCKED → CONTENT_APPROVER_REVIEW

## Part 2 Workflow Order
Step A  [Agency POC]        POST /api/videos/upload-url              → Get presigned S3 URL
Step B  [Agency POC]        PUT <uploadUrl>                          → Upload file to S3 directly
Step C  [Agency POC]        POST /api/videos                         → Register video → MEDICAL_REVIEW
Step D  [Medical Affairs]   POST /api/videos/:id/approve             → MEDICAL_REVIEW → CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW
   or   [Medical Affairs]   POST /api/videos/:id/reject              → MEDICAL_REVIEW → new AGENCY_UPLOAD_PENDING
Step E  [Content/Brand]     POST /api/videos/:id/approve             → CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW → APPROVED
   or   [Content/Brand]     POST /api/videos/:id/reject              → CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW → new AGENCY_UPLOAD_PENDING
   ↳ If FIRST_LINE_UP approved → system auto-creates FIRST_CUT placeholder in AGENCY_UPLOAD_PENDING
   ↳ Agency repeats Steps A–C for phase: FIRST_CUT

response.message: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent

query.description: Filter: SUPER_ADMIN | MEDICAL_AFFAIRS | CONTENT_BRAND | AGENCY_POC | CONTENT_APPROVER

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "Test",
  "lastName": "User",
  "email": "testuser@practo.com",
  "password": "Admin@123",
  "role": "CONTENT_BRAND"
}

query.description: DRAFT | CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW | AGENCY_PRODUCTION | MEDICAL_REVIEW | CONTENT_BRAND_APPROVAL | CONTENT_APPROVER_REVIEW | LOCKED

item.name: ⚙️ Part 1 — Script Workflow (follow steps in order)
Step 3 — Agency Submits Revision  [Agency POC → MEDICAL_REVIEW]
Step 5 — Final Approve  [Content/Brand → CONTENT_APPROVER_REVIEW]  ⚠️ NO REJECT
Step 6 — Lock Script  [Content Approver → LOCKED ✅]  ⚠️ NO REJECT

request.description:
Returns videos waiting for my action + videos I already reviewed.

Response: { available: [...], myReviews: [...], total }

What each role sees:
- Agency POC      → AGENCY_UPLOAD_PENDING + APPROVED videos
- Medical Affairs → MEDICAL_REVIEW videos
- Content/Brand   → CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW videos
- Super Admin     → all statuses

Each video includes a TAT field (or null if not in review stage).
Access: Agency, Medical Affairs, Content/Brand, Super Admin

item.name: Get My Reviews — Approved videos history

request.description:
Paginated history of videos this user has reviewed.

Access: Medical Affairs, Content/Brand, Super Admin

Error if decision is missing or wrong value:
{ success: false, message: 'decision must be APPROVED or REJECTED' }

item.name: Get My Reviews — Rejected videos history
Step A — Get S3 Presigned Upload URL

request.description:
Step 1 of upload. Get presigned S3 URL.

Access: Agency POC, Super Admin

Response:
- uploadUrl: PUT this URL with file binary
- fileUrl: use this in Step C (POST /api/videos)
- key: S3 object key

item.name: Step B — Upload File to S3 (PUT to uploadUrl)

header.description: Must match fileType from Step A

request.description:
PUT the raw file binary to the presigned URL from Step A.

⚠️ NO Authorization header — this goes directly to S3/MinIO, not to our API.
⚠️ Content-Type must exactly match what you sent in Step A.

In Postman:
- Select Body → binary
- Choose your file
- Set Content-Type header to match (e.g. video/mp4)

On success → HTTP 200 (no body) → proceed to Step C

item.name: Step C — Submit Video (register after S3 upload) — FIRST_LINE_UP

request.description:
Step 2 of upload. Register the video after S3 upload succeeds.

Access: Agency POC, Super Admin

Response 201:
{ success: true, message: 'Video submitted for review', video: { ...VideoObject, status: 'MEDICAL_REVIEW' } }
Full video object with reviews[], tat field, script info. fileCategory field guide: - 'video' → use

item.name: Step D — Approve at MEDICAL_REVIEW  [Medical Affairs → CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW]
Step D (alt) — Reject at MEDICAL_REVIEW  [Medical Affairs → new AGENCY_UPLOAD_PENDING]
Step E — Approve at CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW  [Content/Brand → APPROVED]

request.description: Access: Content/Brand (at CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW stage), Super Admin

item.name: Step E (alt) — Reject at CONTENT_BRAND_REVIEW  [Content/Brand → new AGENCY_UPLOAD_PENDING]

request.description:
Returns all comments oldest first.

Access: All roles

variable.description: JWT token — auto-set after any Login request
MinIO direct URL for file downloads. Cloudflare tunnel URL may differ — check server.
